encoded_video.expected_text: Revision 1 is the governed baseline. A plain-language correction creates immutable revision 2, preserving its parent. The child is verified independently. Trust is never inherited. A second correction creates revision 3 without erasing revision 2. Revision 3 returns to compiled, reopening verification with lineage, policy delta, and proof state visible.
encoded_video.asr_transcript: Revision 1 is the governed baseline. A plain language correction creates immutable revision 2, preserving its parent. The child is verified independently, trust is never inherited. A second correction creates revision 3 without erasing revision 2. Revision 3 returns to compiled reopening verification with lineage, policy, delta, and proof state visible.
